title: Letter dated 1 mar 2017
text: File No.CW-I-13/3/2017-CW-1 7 Receipt No 113314/2017/0/0 SECRETARY, WC I le)N 7TIWU Leena Nair IITTa 1-1,4(4)H DO No. CW-l-13/3/2017-CW-I TirItffl el ftWril 11(14 MTh 76 ft-- A - 110001 Secretary Government of India Ministry of Women & Child Development Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi-110001 Website http://www.wcd.nic.in Dated: 1st March, 2017 Dear .) \ I would like to draw your attention to an online complaint box for reporting child sexual abuse, the POCSO e-box developed by NCPCR, which was launched by Minster for Women and Child Development, Smt. Maneka Sanjay Gandhi in New Delhi on 26.08.2016 for easy and direct reporting of sexual offences against children and by children themselves so that action against the offenders after verification can be taken under the POCSO Act, 2012. 2. I would be grateful if you could kindly take appropriate action for popularizing E-Box in all the schools all over India. This video is accessible on below mentioned link on the website of National Commission for Protection of Child Rights: http://ncper.gov.in/index2.php With regards, Yours sincerely, i , \ L _,A..{.) kiCtk,,, (Leena Nair) ---- Shri Anil Swarup Secretary, Ministry of Human Resource Development, Department of School Education & Literacy, Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi-110001.
